chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 1076 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.04.2025. Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. **************** Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan Advocate files vakalatnama as well as comments on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record. Counsel for petitioner under instructions does not wish to press this petition, same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
